headline: A'ja Wilson beats Diana Taurasi to 6,000 points for WNBA record in Aces win
timing: Post within 2 hours if still fresh
story_summary: A'ja Wilson beats Diana Taurasi to 6,000 points for WNBA record in Aces win A'ja Wilson is the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 6,000 points.
key_fact_1: A'ja Wilson beats Diana Taurasi to 6,000 points for WNBA record in Aces win A'ja Wilson is the fastest player in WNBA history to reach 6,000 points.
key_fact_2: Wilson finished with 34 points, 12 rebounds, nine assists and three blocks — just one assist shy of the stat line Aces forward NaLyssa Smith admitted the Aces were hoping to help her reach, but still the first 34-12-9 game in the WNBA has ever seen.
key_fact_3: The Aces started the second quarter on a 19-6 run and led 50-43 at halftime with a huge boost from Wilson, who had 21 points in the first half. "There's really not an offensive area that she can't do," Hammon said. "Her expansion of her offensive floor game has just made her unguardable.
